name: radia-mcp
summary: MCP servers for the Radia CAE ecosystem. 0.19.0 fills build123d depth gaps: bundled auto-generated API reference (142 classes + 65 functions, 1673 lines inspected), plane_axis_location_cookbook, builder_vs_algebra_rosetta (Builder↔Algebra side-by-side), build123d_api tool (API-focused tf-idf). 0.18.0 base: Radia templates + inspect_step + heal.
author: Kengo Sugahara
